---
title: flag-parameter
description: "Detect boolean control parameters."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect boolean control parameters. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func Open(path string, readOnly bool) error
```

## Good

```go
func Open(path string, mode Mode) error
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only flag-parameter`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
